podcasts.text:
Sorry Nick I think this post identifies the real problem.  Food guru biochemistry myopia.  

The illustrated cascade from centralized cardiology completely fails because it treats oxidized LDL (oxLDL) as an isolated chemical villain that randomly sparks an inflammatory immune response inside the artery wall.

They are completely blind to solid-state physics, spin chemistry, and Landauer’s Principle: Atherosclerosis is a structural short-circuit triggered when highly deuterated, chemically unstable industrial seed oils integrate into the endothelial cell membrane, dropping the localized dielectric constant (𝜅≈160→80) and shattering the vertical Z-axis dipole potential of the vascular wall.

Centralized science documents the downstream "smoke", dendritic cells processing oxLDL, Th1, and Th17 cells secreting inflammatory cytokines, and monocyte-derived macrophages forming foam cells, completely ignorant of the fact that the underlying Kinetic Isotope Effect (KIE) of heavy Deuterium (D+) has jammed the sub-molecular power supply, forcing the vascular endothelium to execute an emergency satellite "safe-mode" shutdown.

Industrial seed oils (such as linoleic acid-rich soybean, corn, and canola oils) are not merely chemically unstable polyunsaturated fats prone to oxidation; they are highly concentrated, transgenerational deuterium sinks. Built under mass-production agricultural grids lacking natural solar-thermal filtration of photosynthesis, these fats are packed with extra neutrons that cause arterial problems because they deuterate the water table of tissues. 

The Hydrogen-Bond Collapse: When these deuterated lipids are incorporated into the endothelial cell (EC) membranes and circulating LDL particles, their high mass alters the local permittivity (ε).

The Refractive Inversion: The highly ordered Exclusion Zone (EZ) water lattice (𝜅=160) wrapping the vascular lining undergoes an immediate dielectric collapse (𝜅≈160→80).

This alters the tooth-enamel-like optical refraction properties of the ectodermal-endothelial boundary, causing internal biophotons to leak out as chaotic thermal noise.

The Loss of Total Reflection: The fluid turns into a high-resistance, stagnant sludge caked in heavy water (D2O).

RT @BTCPrague: We recently had the pleasure of having one of the most thought provoking interviews with DR Jack Kruse (@DrJackKruse).

The…

New podcast out.  We cover a lot of ground here from the banned Ted talk to Epsteins work in the human Genome Project to what rich guys in Australia get anhendonia like GLP1-A users do.  

https://t.co/RDb4RCd9p5
When people in government can get away with crimes just because they are powerful and wealthy or have the right connections, the scales are tipped against fairness and equality. The weight of corruption then becomes so heavy that it creates a dent that forces the world we inhabit to become slanted, so much so that justice just slips into the abyss.  

Nature had the foresight to make decisions in hindsight using sunlight and the stable magnetic dynamo.  What happens when the dynamo become de-stabilized?  How should this change your thinking?    

This should remind others of an animal that needs to start changing its coat color before becoming vulnerable to the first snow; the hindsight of changing sunlight and magnetic flux prompts decisions in the now for mammals.  

The direction of thinking is far more important than the progress you are making now. People who don't think well do not realize this. Poor thinking is a function of low dopamine.  If you are headed in the wrong direction what good is your speed of arrival?  Anhedonia is tied to chronic melanin and dopamine loss due to a loss of triplet state oxygen made stable by a stable magnetic field.  If that magnetic field becomes unstable so will dopamine levels and this leads to anhedonia. 

We are the CEO of our life and we must act like it to set the course to the destination we want. The lack of direction, not lack of time, is mankind's modern problem. What is called progress by culture today is now harmful in ways we have yet to perceive.  That is why frequency of light matters to a "mitochondriac."  Become one today.  Here I help Adrian see something he missed.
